finding: Project-filtered Codex Desktop views included unscoped Desktop sessions and could expose more than the requested compact result set.
change: Project filtering now requires repoName or projectPath match.
Unscoped Desktop sessions are excluded from selected-project views.
Selected-project views render at most five session cards.
The unscoped-session notice and Desktop 200-session expansion action are removed from selected-project views.

validation.command: docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker-compose.example.yml -f infra/docker-compose.codex-desktop.yml up -d --build miniapp
